blogs.description: the number of secondary blogs you can create per day

follows.description: the number of blogs you can follow per day

likes.description: the number of posts you can like per day

photos.description: the number of photos you can upload per day

posts.description: the number of posts you can create per day, not including those in communities

community_posts.description: the number of posts in communities you can create per day

reply_likes.description: the number of reply likes you can create per day

video_seconds.description: the number of seconds of video content you can upload per day

videos.description: the number of video files you can upload per day
